meta.phase-name: Schema Mutation API Contract and Revision Safety

phase-plan.purpose: Specify mutation API safety model for content schema changes: draft revisioning, validation gates, publish control, and rollback paths.
phase-plan.scope: Contract-level planning for mutation endpoints and governance behavior; out of scope is full endpoint implementation.

decision.summary: Schema changes follow immutable revisions with draft validation before publish.
decision.impact: Enables deterministic rollback and migration auditability.

suggestion.gap: REQUIREMENTS.xml lacks explicit draft/publish/rollback contract for schema mutation APIs.
suggestion.proposal: Add required lifecycle: `create-draft`, `validate`, `publish`, `rollback`, with migration artifact requirement for breaking changes.
